name_en: Votive Tablet (Ema) Depicting the Four Seasons of Farming
description_en: A folk cultural property (tangible folk cultural property), a votive tablet (ema) depicting farming through the four seasons. It is municipally designated by Oshu City, designated on 2016-02-26. It is located at Aza Minamijinba 103-1, Maesawa, Oshu, Iwate Prefecture.

name_en: Comic Masks for the Kenbai Sword Dance
description_en: A folk cultural property (tangible folk cultural property), comic masks (doke-men) used in the kenbai sword dance. It is municipally designated by Oshu City, designated on 1989-12-26. It is located at Aza Isedo, Isawa Koyama, Oshu, Iwate Prefecture.

A folk cultural property (tangible folk cultural property), the Noh masks of Kisshoin. It is municipally designated by Oshu City, designated on 1989-12-26. It is located at Aza Nakahirusawa, Isawa Koyama, Oshu, Iwate Prefecture.

name_en: Votive Tablet (Ema) of the Kenbai Dance at Yama Shrine

name_en: Uguisuzawa Kagura (with Konno Chuji's Former Collection of Five Kagura Books and Two Kagura Masks)
description_en: A folk cultural property (intangible folk cultural property), the Uguisuzawa kagura, accompanied by five kagura books and two kagura masks formerly held by Konno Chuji. It is municipally designated by Oshu City, designated on 2005-09-30. It is located at Mizusawa Hadacho, Oshu, Iwate Prefecture.
